revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Close paraphrasing}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Close paraphrasing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | class = ambox-Close_paraphrasing{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|article||-section}}|}} | image = [[File:Copyright-problem.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Close paraphrasing|close paraphrasing]] of {{#if:{{{source|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|an external|a non-free copyrighted}} source, {{{source|}}} {{#ifeq: {{str left|{{{source|}}}|4}} | http | ({{Copyvios|url={{{source|}}}|page={{FULLPAGENAME}}}})}} |{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|external|non-free copyrighted}} sources}}'''. | fix = Please help Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} rewriting this {{{1|article}}}] with your own words. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = {{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources|Articles with close paraphrasing}} | all2 = All articles with close paraphrasing }}<!--{{Close paraphrasing}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Close paraphrasing}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Close paraphrasing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | class = ambox-Close_paraphrasing{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|article||-section}}|}} | image = [[File:Copyright-problem.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Close paraphrasing|close paraphrasing]] of {{#if:{{{source|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|an external|a non-free copyrighted}} source, {{{source|}}} {{#ifeq: {{str left|{{{source|}}}|4}} | http | ({{Copyvios|url={{{source|}}}|page={{FULLPAGENAME}}}})}} |{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|external|non-free copyrighted}} sources}}'''. | fix = Please help Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} rewriting this {{{1|article}}}] with your own words. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = {{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources|Articles with close paraphrasing}} | all2 = All articles with close paraphrasing }}<!--{{Close paraphrasing}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Close paraphrasing}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Close paraphrasing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | class = ambox-Close_paraphrasing{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|article||-section}}|}} | image = [[File:Copyright-problem.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Close paraphrasing|close paraphrasing]] of {{#if:{{{source|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|an external|a non-free copyrighted}} source, {{{source|}}} {{#ifeq: {{str left|{{{source|}}}|4}} | http | ({{Copyvios|url={{{source|}}}|page={{FULLPAGENAME}}}})}} |{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|external|non-free copyrighted}} sources}}'''. | fix = Please help Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} rewriting this {{{1|article}}}] with your own words. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = {{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources|Articles with close paraphrasing}} | all2 = All articles with close paraphrasing }}<!--{{Close paraphrasing}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Close_paraphrasing here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Close_paraphrasing for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Close paraphrasing}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Close paraphrasing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | class = ambox-Close_paraphrasing{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|article||-section}}|}} | image = [[File:Copyright-problem.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Close paraphrasing|close paraphrasing]] of {{#if:{{{source|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|an external|a non-free copyrighted}} source, {{{source|}}} {{#ifeq: {{str left|{{{source|}}}|4}} | http | ({{Copyvios|url={{{source|}}}|page={{FULLPAGENAME}}}})}} |{{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|external|non-free copyrighted}} sources}}'''. | fix = Please help Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} rewriting this {{{1|article}}}] with your own words. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = {{#ifeq:{{{free|}}}|yes|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources|Articles with close paraphrasing}} | all2 = All articles with close paraphrasing }}<!--{{Close paraphrasing}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
